pi_items.source: Jenkins OWASP Markup Formatter Plugin documentation (https://javadoc.jenkins.io/plugin/antisamy-markup-formatter/hudson/markup/RawHtmlMarkupFormatter.html)
Task description confirms this date; web search confirms January 25, 2025 is a Saturday (https://www.dayoftheweek.org/?m=January&d=25&y=2025&go=Go)

Task description field; web search confirms company.com is a standard placeholder domain used in examples (https://github.com/MicrosoftDocs/azure-devops-docs/blob/main/docs/organizations/notifications/change-email-address.md)

pi_items.verified_value: All running builds will be suspended
pi_items.source: Task description HTML contains phrase 'All running builds will be suspended'
Task description HTML contains phrase 'Please plan your deployments accordingly'

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Jenkins with the hudson.markup.RawHtmlMarkupFormatter (Safe HTML) plugin to display a system-wide announcement banner. The announcement content includes a 'Scheduled Maintenance Notice' heading, specifies a maintenance date of Saturday, January 25, 2025, with maintenance window from 02:00 to 06:00 UTC. The announcement lists three key items: 'All running builds will be suspended', 'Pipeline executions will be paused', and 'Please plan your deployments accordingly', along with contact email devops-team@company.com. January 25, 2025 is confirmed as a Saturday. The email domain 'company.com' is a standard placeholder used in example documentation. All announced content is generated synthetically for this Jenkins configuration task, not from an external dataset.
